build.beforeDevCommand: pnpm run dev:sidecar && pnpm run dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: pnpm run build && pnpm run build:sidecar

security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: https:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://api.github.com; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-src 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: https: http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://api.github.com http://localhost:* ws://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* ws://127.0.0.1:*; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-src 'none'
